creator: ashish@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to p5B2E9A8F from comment #0)

You need databases/sqlite3 built with UNICODE61 option (which is enabled by default in the port). You can determine this with:

  λ pkg info databases/sqlite3 |fgrep UNICODE61
	  UNICODE61      : on

This check is added in `pre-everything' target, which works fine in non-builder environments (poudriere, synth, et. al.), although kind of disabled in builder environments as real `pkg` binary is not always available when the check runs.

If you have any advice on how to implement this better, please share.

HTH
